description.en: Deep exposure of the Orion Nebula revealing intricate gas and dust structures
description.zh: 猎户座星云的深度曝光，展现复杂的气体和尘埃结构

description.en: Our nearest large galactic neighbor, 2.5 million light-years away
description.zh: 距我们最近的大型星系邻居，距离250万光年

description.en: Wide-field panorama of the Milky Way core captured under dark skies
description.zh: 在暗夜天空下拍摄的银河核心广角全景

description.en: The solar corona revealed during totality with visible prominences
description.zh: 日全食期间展现的日冕及可见日珥

description.en: 4-hour exposure capturing the apparent rotation of stars around the celestial pole
description.zh: 4小时曝光捕捉恒星围绕天极的视运动轨迹

description.en: The observatory dome silhouetted against the twilight sky before a night of observation
description.zh: 观测之夜前，天文台圆顶在暮光天空下的剪影
